rationale: Educ. Code §48.118 establishes the R-PEP allotment based on the basic allotment and ADA multipliers, with a $20M cap. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: The total amount of state funding for allotments and outcomes bonuses under this section may not exceed $20 million per year.
_note: No direct textual link between the homestead exemption amount and the R-PEP allotment formula in this statute. Any indirect fiscal impact would flow through broader school finance formulas outside this provision.
